title: DevMate – AI Productivity Platform
description: AI-powered productivity platform that enables natural voice-to-voice interaction with multiple tools. DevMate provides agentic workflows for web search, YouTube summarization, stock prices, currency conversion, and document-based(multi format files like .png, .pdf, .pptx etc) Q&A, with support for downloadable AI-generated outputs.

title: Mailcruit – AI-Powered Job Application Email Generator
description: Mailcruit is a browser extension that generates personalized job application emails from copied job descriptions. It uses OpenAI or Gemini APIs to analyze the posting, extract recruiter details, and automatically draft a professional email in Gmail, significantly reducing manual effort.

title: AI-Powered YouTube Upload Automation Pipeline
description: Automated YouTube video upload system that uses ChatGPT to generate SEO-optimized titles, descriptions, and tags from minimal input, then publishes via YouTube Data API and logs results in Google Sheets through a Railway-deployed webhook backend.

title: Online Clipboard - Ephemeral Cross-Device File Sharing
description: A web-based clipboard that enables users to securely share text, images, and files across devices using short 4-digit codes without authentication. Features TTL-based ephemeral storage, single-use retrieval, collision-safe code generation, automated cleanup workflows, and support for real-time cross-device sharing.
